headlines.description: Bayern Munich squandered a two-goal lead to slump to a shock 3-2 loss at Heidenheim on Saturday that all but dashed their slim Bundesliga title hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern throw away 2-0 lead in loss to Heidenheim

video.headline: Bayern Munich loses 2-0 halftime lead, fall to FC Heidenheim

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (German Bundesliga) (Bayern Munich loses 2-0 halftime lead, fall to FC Heidenheim) 2024/04/06

events.name: Bayer Leverkusen at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayer Leverkusen battled past Union Berlin 1-0 on Saturday to equal a league record unbeaten run of 28 consecutive matches and all but secure their first league title with a 16-point advantage at the top and six matches remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen one win from title after beating Union

video.headline: Leverkusen lead 10-man Union after VAR spots handball

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (German Bundesliga) (Leverkusen lead 10-man Union after VAR spots handball) 2024/04/06
